---

assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of the logical error or incorrect reasoning.

## Which File?
- [ ] SKILL.md
- [ ] examples/debugging.md
- [ ] examples/decision-making.md
- [ ] examples/problem-solving.md
- [ ] examples/system-design.md
- [ ] examples/optimization.md
- [ ] metadata.json
- [ ] Other: ___

## Expected Behavior
What the correct reasoning/output should be.

## Evidence
Provide sources, proofs, or references that support the correction.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
